channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Japanese artist Murakami lends artwork to exclusive MLB collaboration ahead of Tokyo Series
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Takashi Murakami’s artwork has graced luxury goods from top fashion houses and album covers of superstar musicians. Now the famed contemporary Japanese artist has teamed with Major League Baseball for an exclusive merchandise collaboration to celebrate next month’s Tokyo Series.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Verstappen and Norris 'respect' each other while joking about their F1 rivalry
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Max Verstappen and Lando Norris dismissed suggestions their Formula 1 rivalry has become a personal feud, going so far as to joke on Thursday that they’d been reduced to brawling in a pub.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ref reports 'Die' chants made at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio in Copa semifinal
item.description: A referee says Real Sociedad fans chanted “Die” at Real Madrid defender Raúl Asencio during the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NASCAR stars enjoy immersive Mexico City visit ahead of first international Cup Series race
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Daniel Suarez led a quartet of NASCAR stars through the streets of Mexico City, after midnight, in search of a nightcap following a full day of showcasing his native country to his fellow competitors.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Norway is voting on whether to scrap VAR. The wider soccer world is watching with interest
item.description: Norwegian soccer will vote this weekend on whether to scrap the use of video reviews in its top league after a turbulent couple of years since the technology was introduced.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 73, Cathedral 61
item.description:
Carlsbad basketball had a repeat on its mind: a goal to get back to the Open Division title game.
Consider it mission accomplished after a 73 to 61 win over a hard charging Cathedral team.
Jett Kenady was the difference for the Lancers on Tuesday night, scoring 24 points. Jake Hall added 22.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tre Holloman's midcourt buzzer-beater could propel Michigan State to a Big Ten title
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman hadn't even reached the “M” logo at midcourt when he jumped off one foot and let the ball fly. Somehow, it stayed on line before dropping through the hoop with a swish that reverberated across the Big Ten.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints GM and coach indicate they plan to stick with QB Derek Carr
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — New Orleans Saints general manager Mickey Loomis sees 11-year veteran quarterback Derek Carr as “a guy we can win with, and we’re excited about it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Riley Gaines sends warning to Democrats, NCAA during national battle over trans athletes in women's sports
item.description: Former NCAA swimmer and OutKick host Riley Gaines warned Democrats and the NCAA Wednesday about multiple conflicts involving transgender athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool increases lead atop Premier League as Arsenal drops more points
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — It feels like a matter of when, not if, Liverpool seals a record-equaling 20th English league title. The gap at the top of the Premier League was extended to 13 points on Wednesday after a 2-0 victory over Newcastle.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kylie Kravig Makes History as CMU’s All-Time Assists Leader
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — When the Colorado Mesa Mavericks need a play, there’s one player they trust to have the ball in her hands—Kylie Kravig. Kravig has been the floor general for the Mavericks all season, averaging six assists per game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe, an 8-year NFL veteran who played his entire career with the Minnesota Vikings, took to the podium to voice his opposition to the plaque design.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL player Chris Kluwe arrested while protesting MAGA sign at city council meeting
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe was detained at a city council meeting in California on Tuesday after delivering an impassioned speech criticizing the design of a plaque to be installed at the Huntington Beach Central Library.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5
